original_title: REBDB-999 Mai5: The Season of Love That Descended - Mai Nanashima Blu-ray Edition (Blu-ray Disc) - Mai Nanami
overview: Starring in this film is Mai Nanashima, also known as Maimai! With her perfect looks, lovely small face, amazing figure, and adorable fair skin like a kitten, she's a true beauty! This is the fifth image video featuring Mai Nanashima and REbecca, and this time the location is Thailand, a tropical paradise with gentle breezes. Maimai captivates with outfits that show minimal fabric, including maid outfits, swimsuits, sheer cheongsams, and see-through lingerie. The fleeting moments guided by the tropical light, her innocent expressions transform even the silence into a thrilling experience. Her lovely charm remains, but she seduces with an unprecedented allure that will leave you breathless and overwhelmed. In the land of smiles, you share an intimate time alone together, transcending words, and the heroine you've dreamed of that day descends before you. Bathed in the light of a foreign land, her sweet smile enters your heart, and every gesture signals the beginning of love! *This is a Blu-ray Disc exclusive. Please note that it cannot be played on players other than compatible ones. *This product is a BD-R disc.
title: REBDB 999
